theory_nodes.concept: The working MC -- career built through consistent output and live performance; thousands of hours of writing, recording, performing, networking; the depth behind the simple label of 'rapper'
examples: Regular performances at Neumos, The Crocodile, Nectar Lounge, house shows.
Consistent release cadence: singles, EPs, projects. High-frequency output.
Collaborative network: features with other Seattle MCs and producers.
Local focus. The career is built in Seattle, for Seattle.
theory_nodes.description: The working MC. Consistent output. Live circuit. Depth behind the label.

Mr. Hill (150): Confirms the tier is a population of artists.
Two consecutive degrees = structural significance, not anecdotal.
The engine documents the tier as a feature of the ecosystem.

cross_references.relationship: TIER PAIR! Two consecutive self-released underground MCs. J. Pinder introduced the tier; Mr. Hill confirms it as a population.
UNDERGROUND SEQUENCE! Teodros (Ethiopian diaspora, 148) > J. Pinder (deep underground, 149) > Mr. Hill (working MC, 150). Three consecutive underground-tier entries.
NEXT DEGREE! From deep underground (Mr. Hill) to new generation conscious hip-hop (Sol). The generational shift.
PLATEAU! E=5 from 134 to 150 = seventeen degrees. Unprecedented sustained energy.
